---
name: Plugin Request
about: Request or suggest a new Enhanced App plugin
title: '[Plugin] '
labels: plugin
---

## Service / App
Which service or app should the plugin support? (e.g. Plex, Home Assistant, Proxmox)

## What data to show
What stats or information should the tiles display?

## API available?
Does the service have a public API? Link to docs if available.
